programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: Jim's band wins a contest, providing the group an opportunity to play backup for child pop sensation Jami McFame.

programme.title: Death on the Nile
programme.desc: Belgian sleuth Hercule Poirot's Egyptian vacation aboard a glamorous river steamer turns into a terrifying search for a murderer when a picture-perfect couple's idyllic honeymoon is tragically cut short.

programme.title: The Transporter
programme.desc: Ex-Special Forces operator Frank Martin (Jason Statham) lives what seems to be a quiet life along the French Mediterranean, hiring himself out as a mercenary transporter who moves goods - human or otherwise - from one place to another. No questions asked. Dangerous complications ensue when he is hired to kidnap the feisty daughter of a lethal Chinese crime lord who's smuggling his fellow countrymen into France.

programme.title: Transporter 2
programme.desc: Mercenary Frank Martin (Jason Statham) has accepted a job that seems easy enough, as chauffeur and bodyguard to young Jack (Hunter Clary), son of crusading politician Jefferson Billings (Matthew Modine). The problem is that Billings is crusading against an international drug cartel. They retaliate by kidnapping Jack and infecting him with a deadly and highly contagious virus. Responsible for the boy, Frank must reclaim him and then find an antidote before scores of innocents are stricken.

programme.title: Jason Bourne
programme.desc: It's been 10 years since Jason Bourne (Matt Damon) walked away from the agency that trained him to become a deadly weapon. Hoping to draw him out of the shadows, CIA director Robert Dewey assigns hacker and counterinsurgency expert Heather Lee to find him. Lee suspects that former operative Nicky Parsons is also looking for him. As she begins tracking the duo, Bourne finds himself back in action battling a sinister network that utilizes terror and technology to maintain unchecked power.

programme.title: Cast Away
programme.desc: Obsessively punctual FedEx executive Chuck Noland (Tom Hanks) is en route to an assignment in Malaysia when his plane crashes over the Pacific Ocean during a storm. The sole survivor of the flight, Chuck washes ashore on a deserted island. When his efforts to sail away and contact help fail, Chuck learns how to survive on the island, where he remains for years, accompanied by only his handmade volleyball friend, Wilson. Will Chuck ever return to civilization and reunite with his loved ones?

programme.title: Night at the Museum: Secret of the Tomb
programme.desc: When the exhibits at New York's Natural History Museum start behaving strangely, Larry Daley (Ben Stiller) -- now the director of nighttime operations -- must find out the cause. He learns that the Tablet, which magically brings Teddy Roosevelt (Robin Williams), Jedediah (Owen Wilson) and the other exhibits to life at night, has started to decay. Larry, along with his son and museum friends, must travel to London's British Museum to learn how to prevent the Tablet's magic from disappearing.

programme.title: The Garfield Movie
programme.desc: Garfield, the Monday-hating, lasagna-loving indoor cat, finds himself on a wild outdoor adventure when his long-lost father draws him into a high-stakes heist.

programme.title: The Kid Who Would Be King
programme.desc: Old-school magic meets the modern world when young Alex stumbles upon the mythical sword Excalibur. He soon unites his friends and enemies, and they become knights who join forces with the legendary wizard Merlin. Together, they must save mankind from the wicked enchantress Morgana and her army of supernatural warriors.

programme.title: The Song of Bernadette
programme.desc: Based on the popular novel by Franz Werfel, this drama focuses on Bernadette Soubirous (Jennifer Jones), a young French woman who experiences vivid visions of the Virgin Mary. While many dismiss her claims, certain people, including the priest Dominique Peyramale (Charles Bickford), slowly begin to believe her. Eventually, Bernadette is deemed a saint, and becomes a nun at a convent, where she must deal with jealousy from others who resent her revered status.

programme.title: The Fly
programme.desc: When scientist Andre Delambre (Al Hedison) tests his matter transporter on himself, an errant housefly makes its way into the transportation chamber, and things go horribly wrong. As a result, Delambre's head and arm are now that of the insect. Slowly losing himself to the fly, Delambre turns to his wife, Helene (Patricia Owens), for help. But when tragedy strikes, Delambre's brother (Vincent Price) and Inspector Charas (Herbert Marshall) are forced to pick up the investigation.

programme.title: The Day the Earth Stood Still
programme.desc: When a UFO lands in Washington, D.C., bearing a message for Earth's leaders, all of humanity stands still. Klaatu has come on behalf of alien life who have been watching Cold War-era nuclear proliferation on Earth. But it is Klaatu's soft-spoken robot Gort that presents a more immediate threat to onlookers. A single mother and her son teach the world about peace and tolerance in this moral fable, ousting the tanks and soldiers that greet the alien's arrival.

programme.title: Quintet
programme.desc: A frozen wasteland is the scene of an unusual game of life or death where the victims fight to remain alive.

programme.title: Enemy Mine
programme.desc: During a war between humans and the reptilian Drac race, spaceship pilot Willis Davidge ends up stranded on an alien world, along with enemy fighter Jeriba Shigan. While both Willis and his Drac counterpart can breathe on the planet, the environment and its creatures are relatively hostile, forcing the two to work together to survive. As time goes by, Willis and Jeriba become unlikely friends, though their unique relationship faces considerable challenges.

programme.title: Cocoon
programme.desc: Oscar-winning fantasy in which the residents of a Florida rest home get a new lease of life when they stumble across an alien "fountain of youth" in a disused holiday home. Unbeknown to them, aliens have been using the swimming pool in the house to store their cocooned brethren, giving the waters a powerful, rejuvenating quality.

programme.title: Ad Astra
programme.desc: Thirty years ago, Clifford McBride led a voyage into deep space, but the ship and crew were never heard from again. Now his son -- a fearless astronaut -- must embark on a daring mission to Neptune to uncover the truth about his missing father and a mysterious power surge that threatens the stability of the universe.

programme.title: Alita: Battle Angel
programme.desc: Set several centuries in the future, the abandoned Alita is found in the scrapyard of Iron City by Ido, a compassionate cyber-doctor who takes the unconscious cyborg Alita to his clinic. When Alita awakens, she has no memory of who she is, nor does she have any recognition of the world she finds herself in. As Alita learns to navigate her new life and the treacherous streets of Iron City, Ido tries to shield her from her mysterious past.

programme.title: The Martian
programme.desc: When astronauts blast off from the planet Mars, they leave behind Mark Watney, presumed dead after a fierce storm. With only a meager amount of supplies, the stranded visitor must utilize his wits and spirit to find a way to survive on the hostile planet. Meanwhile, back on Earth, members of NASA and a team of international scientists work tirelessly to bring him home, while his crew mates hatch their own plan for a daring rescue mission.

programme.title: Alita: Battle Angel
programme.desc: Set several centuries in the future, the abandoned Alita is found in the scrapyard of Iron City by Ido, a compassionate cyber-doctor who takes the unconscious cyborg Alita to his clinic. When Alita awakens, she has no memory of who she is, nor does she have any recognition of the world she finds herself in. As Alita learns to navigate her new life and the treacherous streets of Iron City, Ido tries to shield her from her mysterious past.

programme.title: Ad Astra
programme.desc: Thirty years ago, Clifford McBride led a voyage into deep space, but the ship and crew were never heard from again. Now his son -- a fearless astronaut -- must embark on a daring mission to Neptune to uncover the truth about his missing father and a mysterious power surge that threatens the stability of the universe.

programme.title: Patton
programme.desc: Biography of controversial World War II hero General George S. Patton. The film covers his wartime activities and accomplishments, beginning with his entry into the North African campaign and ending with his removal from command after his outspoken criticism of US post-war military strategy.

programme.title: The Horror of It All
programme.desc: Yankee salesman Jack (Pat Boone) wants to marry Cynthia Marley (Erica Rogers), and they travel to her family's English estate to break the good news. Cynthia warns that the family is a bit odd, which proves to be an understatement. One relative is an ex-thespian who still believes he's in a play, another behaves like a vampire and a third is imprisoned in the cellar due to his violent tendencies. But things get really sinister when the Marleys start succumbing to violent fates, one by one.

programme.title: The Hustler
programme.desc: The story follows Fast Eddie Felsen (Paul Newman) and his adventures in the world of professional pool. Fast Eddie is a young hopeful on his way to challenging Minnesota Fats (Jackie Gleason) for his world title. When he starts getting feelings for a woman he gets into a dilemma.

programme.title: The Detective
programme.desc: When a gay man is viciously slain, Detective Joe Leland (Frank Sinatra) is put on the case. Joe eventually tracks down the victim's roommate, who confesses to the crime and is sentenced to death; however, the outcome of the case doesn't sit well with the detective. Norma (Jacqueline Bisset), a distraught widow, visits Joe. She believes her husband's death was no accident, but the cops don't seem to care. Joe begins to investigate, and stumbles on a cover-up related to his previous case.

programme.title: The French Connection
programme.desc: New York Detective Popeye Doyle (Gene Hackman) and his partner (Roy Scheider) chase a French heroin smuggler.

programme.title: Hitman: Agent 47
programme.desc: Genetically engineered from conception to be the perfect killing machine, he's the culmination of decades of research, endowed with unprecedented strength, speed, stamina and intelligence. Known only as Agent 47 (Rupert Friend), his latest target is a corporation that plans to unlock the secret of his past to create an army of killers even more powerful than him. With help from a young woman, the elite assassin confronts revelations about his own origins in an epic battle with his deadliest foe.

programme.title: Unstoppable
programme.desc: When a massive, unmanned locomotive roars out of control, the threat is more ominous than just a derailment. The train is laden with toxic chemicals, and an accident would decimate human life and cause an environmental disaster. The only hope of bringing the train to a safe stop is in the hands of a veteran engineer (Denzel Washington) and a young conductor (Chris Pine), who must risk their lives to save those in the runaway's path. Inspired by true events.

programme.title: Con Air
programme.desc: Just-paroled army ranger Cameron Poe (Nicolas Cage) is headed back to his wife (Monica Potter), but must fly home aboard a prison transport flight dubbed "Jailbird" with some of the worst criminals living. Along with Diamond Dog (Ving Rhames) and Baby-O (Mykelti Williamson), genius serial killer Cyrus "The Virus" Grissom (John Malkovich) unleashes a violent escape plot in mid-flight. Secretly working with U.S. Marshall Vince Larkin (John Cusack), Poe tries to foil Grissom's plan.

programme.title: Taken
programme.desc: A former government operative comes out of retirement and uses all his extensive training to rescue his estranged daughter from a slave trade operation.

programme.title: Taken 2
programme.desc: Two years ago, retired CIA agent Bryan Mills (Liam Neeson) used his "particular set of skills" to rescue his daughter, Kim (Maggie Grace), from kidnappers. Since then, Kim has been learning self-defense from her father, and Bryan has been on a personal mission to reunite with his ex-wife (Famke Janssen). In Istanbul, Bryan and his family cross paths with Murad (Rade Serbedzija), whose son died at Bryan's hand during Kim's rescue. Murad wants revenge, and he'll stop at nothing to get it.

programme.title: Taken 3
programme.desc: Ex-covert operative Bryan Mills (Liam Neeson) and his ex-wife, Lenore (Famke Janssen), are enjoying a reconciliation when Lenore is brutally murdered. Bryan is framed for the crime and flees, with the CIA, FBI and police all in hot pursuit. For the last time, he channels his rage and particular set of skills into hunting down Lenore's real killers, taking his revenge and protecting the one important thing left in his life: his daughter, Kim (Maggie Grace).

programme.title: Fight Club
programme.desc: A depressed man suffering from insomnia meets a strange soap salesman named Tyler Durden and soon finds himself living in his squalid house after his perfect apartment is destroyed. The two bored men form an underground club with strict rules and fight other men who are fed up with their mundane lives. Their perfect partnership frays when Marla, a fellow support group crasher, attracts Tyler's attention.

programme.title: Nightmare Alley
programme.desc: Roustabout Stanton Carlisle joins a traveling carny and unsuccessfully schemes to figure out the mind-reading act of Mademoiselle Zeena and her alcoholic husband, Pete. But when Pete dies, Zeena is forced to take on Stanton as a partner, and he quickly proves more gifted than his predecessor. Ambitious to a fault, Carlisle abandons Zeena and the carny to reinvent himself as The Great Stanton, wowing high-class audiences in a Chicago hotel.

programme.title: Decision Before Dawn
programme.desc: During World War II, an American intelligence unit led by Col. Devlin (Gary Merrill) is recruiting German prisoners of war to infiltrate enemy lines and gather vital information. Lt. Rennick (Richard Basehart) heads a unit of Germans that includes the mistrustful "Tiger" (Hans Christian Blech) and the wide-eyed "Happy" (Oskar Werner). When word arrives that a German general is about to negotiate the surrender of his corps, Devlin sends Rennick and his volunteers on a dangerous mission.

programme.title: Hell and High Water
programme.desc: Mercenary sub commander, Captain Adam Jones (Richard Widmark), sells his services to noted atomic scientist Professor Montel (Victor Francen) and his daughter, Denise (Bella Darvi). Professor Montel is convinced the Communists are about to launch a nuclear attack on Korea from an island in the Arctic and blame it on the United States. Captain Jones does not care about politics, but the earnest Professor and his supporters win him over to their cause and they try to thwart the Communist's plans.

programme.title: Voyage to the Bottom of the Sea
programme.desc: Harriman Nelson (Walter Pidgeon) is the creator of a revolutionary nuclear submarine. After testing its capabilities in the Arctic Ocean, Nelson and the commanding officer (Robert Sterling) surface the vessel, only to discover the sky ablaze. Learning that the Van Allen radiation belt has caught fire, Nelson conceives a plan that could save the planet from destruction, but the U.N. shoots it down. Nelson is convinced it will work, but an onboard psychiatrist (Joan Fontaine) questions his sanity.

programme.title: Fathom
programme.desc: While touring abroad in Europe, beautiful American skydiver Fathom Harvill (Raquel Welch) gets wrapped up in international intrigue when Scottish spy Douglas Campbell (Ronald Fraser) recruits her to help him on a secret mission. Before long, Fathom realizes that no one around her, including the mysterious Peter Merriweather (Tony Franciosa), can easily be trusted, leading to various adventures that involve bull fighting, beaches and, of course, romance.

programme.title: The Neptune Factor
programme.desc: When an earthquake on the ocean floor causes an underwater laboratory to fall into a deep trench and places the scientists' lives in peril, Cmdr. Adrian Blake (Ben Gazzara) embarks on a rescue mission in his small experimental submarine. Along with a crew that includes Dr. Leah Jansen (Yvette Mimieux) and diver Don MacKay (Ernest Borgnine), Blake attempts to save the scientists from the unexplored depths, while encountering gigantic sea creatures that threaten their survival.

programme.title: Resident Evil: Welcome to Raccoon City
programme.desc: Welcome to Raccoon City, once the booming home of pharmaceutical giant Umbrella Corp. The company's exodus left the city a wasteland, a dying town with great evil brewing below the surface. When that evil is unleashed, a group of survivors must work together to uncover the truth behind Umbrella and make it through the night.

programme.title: Alien: Romulus
programme.desc: Space colonizers come face to face with the most terrifying life-form in the universe while scavenging the deep ends of a derelict space station.

After a catastrophic crash on an unknown planet, pilot Mills quickly discovers he's actually stranded on Earth -- 65 million years ago. Now, with only one chance at a rescue, Mills and the only other survivor, Koa, must make their way across an unknown terrain riddled with dangerous prehistoric creatures.

programme.title: This Is The End
programme.desc: The end of the world is coming...and it's going to be hilarious.

programme.title: Fun With Dick And Jane (2005)
programme.desc: Dick Harper's (Jim Carrey) years of hard work finally pay off when he is promoted to vice president at Glabodyne, a world leader in the consolidation of media properties. But after exactly one day on his new job, Glabodyne is destroyed by an Enron-like calamity and he is left holding the bag. Dick's sudden reversal of fortune has left him little time to set aside money for a rainy day. After playing by the rules and working single-mindedly to build a comfortable life for his family, Dick is utterly unprepared to give up on the American dream. Taking a lesson from his corrupt employer, Dick hits on a brilliant idea: If stealing is good enough for his boss, then it's good enough for him. Using his new found skills, he and Jane exact hilarious revenge and teach big business a lesson.

programme.title: America's Sweethearts
programme.desc: When a public romance turns into a private breakup, only a press agent and an assistant can help.

programme.title: Daddy Day Camp
programme.desc: DADDY DAY CARE pals Charlie and Phil are back in this hilarious, all-new adventure: DADDY DAY CAMP! When the dads expand their childcare magic to Camp Driftwood - serving up sports, crafts and teaching the kids a thing or two about nature, they discover the camp has everything it needs except a plan to put the bullies of rival Camp Canola to shame. With some quick thinking, teamwork, a secret weapon and some off-the-wall crazy antics, the dads and kids unite to make sure DADDY DAY CAMP secures its rightful place in kid camp history!

programme.title: RV (2006)
programme.desc: A forced family vacation in a recreational vehicle rapidly turns into a disaster.

programme.title: Year One
programme.desc: After eating from the Tree of Knowledge, a primitive villager/slacker flees his people and encounters murderous Cain, slave traders, charismatic nutcase Abraham, and finally the city of Sodom. There the man falls for a princess, is hailed as "the chosen" by the oppressed people and ultimately leads a revolt that topples the government and frees the slaves. He heads off with the princess to visit Egypt....

programme.title: Daddy Day Camp
programme.desc: DADDY DAY CARE pals Charlie and Phil are back in this hilarious, all-new adventure: DADDY DAY CAMP! When the dads expand their childcare magic to Camp Driftwood - serving up sports, crafts and teaching the kids a thing or two about nature, they discover the camp has everything it needs except a plan to put the bullies of rival Camp Canola to shame. programme.title: RV (2006)
programme.desc: A forced family vacation in a recreational vehicle rapidly turns into a disaster.

There the man falls for a princess, is hailed as "the chosen" by the oppressed people and ultimately leads a revolt that topples the government and frees the slaves. He heads off with the princess to visit Egypt....

programme.title: Hitch (2005)
programme.desc: Meet Hitch (Will Smith), New York City's greatest matchmaker. Love is his job and he'll get you the girl of your dreams in just three easy dates, guaranteed!

programme.title: Rough Night
programme.desc: Five friends get a beach house in Miami for a wild bachelorette weekend that goes completely off the rails.

programme.title: The Big Hit
programme.desc: A quartet of hit men are drawn into a moonlighting gig that turns sour when they kidnap an heiress with connections to the mob.

programme.title: Excess Baggage
programme.desc: Alicia Silverstone (Clueless) stars in this romantic comedy about a woman who tries to get back at her father by faking her own kidnapping. When her harebrained scheme gets her locked in the trunk of her own car, she falls into a relationship with a car thief (Benicio Del Toro).

programme.title: Catch And Release
programme.desc: For a grieving fiancée, learning to love again requires the help of her late love's three best friends.

programme.title: Another You
programme.desc: ANOTHER YOU is the uproarious slapstick comedy about a pathological liar who, upon his release from a mental clinic, becomes involved with a con man and ends up impersonating a billionaire. Scam follows double-scam in classic Pryor/Wilder style. Features Academy Award winner Mercedes Ruehl as a con who falls for Gene Wilder.

programme.title: Little Black Book
programme.desc: A young woman's life begins to resemble the daytime TV talk show she works for after she is persuaded to snoop through her boyfriend's Palm Pilot and discovers more than she wants to know about his past - and present.

programme.title: Made Of Honor
programme.desc: Tom loves his life, until he realizes he also loves his best friend Hannah. But when Hannah gets engaged to a dashing Scotsman and asks Tom to be her maid of honor, Tom faces hostile bridesmaids, bridal showers, and bad hair days, all in an effort to pull off the perfect wedding and steal the bride. He&apos's a maid of honor with a plan.

programme.title: Another You
programme.desc: ANOTHER YOU is the uproarious slapstick comedy about a pathological liar who, upon his release from a mental clinic, becomes involved with a con man and ends up impersonating a billionaire. Scam follows double-scam in classic Pryor/Wilder style. Features Academy Award winner Mercedes Ruehl as a con who falls for Gene Wilder.

programme.title: Little Black Book
programme.desc: A young woman's life begins to resemble the daytime TV talk show she works for after she is persuaded to snoop through her boyfriend's Palm Pilot and discovers more than she wants to know about his past - and present.

programme.title: Made Of Honor
programme.desc: Tom loves his life, until he realizes he also loves his best friend Hannah. But when Hannah gets engaged to a dashing Scotsman and asks Tom to be her maid of honor, Tom faces hostile bridesmaids, bridal showers, and bad hair days, all in an effort to pull off the perfect wedding and steal the bride. He&apos's a maid of honor with a plan.

programme.title: My Best Friend's Wedding (1997)
programme.desc: Two friends (Julia Roberts and Dermot Mulroney) go from an impossible possibility to an unimaginable reality in this romantic comedy.

programme.title: Anger Management (2003)
programme.desc: A timid businessman is wrongly sentenced to an anger management program, where he has his life turned upside-down by an ultra-agressive instructor who hardly practices what he preaches.

programme.title: Two If By Sea
programme.desc: Petty thief Frank O'Brien steals a $4 million masterpiece painting. His cashier girlfriend of seven years, Roz, befriends the potential buyer of the painting, Evan Marsh, on an island. After being captured by FBI Agent O'Malley at the fish factory, she discovers Marsh is actually an art thief.

programme.title: Catch And Release
programme.desc: For a grieving fiancée, learning to love again requires the help of her late love's three best friends.

programme.title: Paul Blart: Mall Cop 2
programme.desc: After six years of keeping our malls safe, Paul Blart (Kevin James) has earned a vacation. He heads to Vegas with his teenage daughter and finds that safety never takes a holiday. When duty calls, Blart answers.

programme.title: Goosebumps
programme.desc: After moving to a small town, Zach Cooper finds a silver lining when he meets next door neighbor Hannah, the daughter of bestselling Goosebumps series author R.L. Stine. Stine is very mysterious and a prisoner of his own imagination – the monsters that his books made famous are real, and he protects his readers by keeping them locked up in their manuscripts. When the monsters are accidentally unleashed and begin to terrorize the town, it's up to Stine, Zach and Hannah to get them back in their books where they belong.

programme.title: Here Today (2021)
programme.desc: Legendary comedy writer, Charlie Berns, in the initial stages of dementia, is befriended by Emma, a plucky, spirited, gutsy young singer and street performer who is not about to bail on Charlie, even as his condition deteriorates.

programme.title: Chances Are
programme.desc: A widow's husband is reincarnated 25 years later as a dashing young man their daughter's age.

programme.title: Julie & Julia
programme.desc: Meryl Streep is Julia Child and Amy Adams is Julie Powell in writer-director Nora Ephron's adaptation of two bestselling memoirs: Powell's Julie & Julia and My Life in France, by Julia Child with Alex Prud'homme. Based on two true stories, Julie & Julia intertwines the lives of two women who, though separated by time and space, are both at loose ends...until they discover that with the right combination of passion, fearlessness and butter, anything is possible.

programme.title: Almost Famous
programme.desc: Rolling Stone Magazine unwittingly hires a 15 year old aspiring journalist after reading an article he wrote for Cream Magazine. ALMOST FAMOUS is the hilarious and touching story of this intelligent young man's journey into the world of Rock-and-Roll as he tours with "Stillwater", an up-and-coming band struggling with their rise to fame.

programme.title: Stepmom
programme.desc: An unlikely friendship develops when a mother of two is forced to teach another woman to raise her kids. Julia Roberts and Susan Sarandon star.

programme.title: As Good As It Gets
programme.desc: The Academy Award-winning (best actor Jack Nicholson, best actress Helen Hunt) offbeat comedy celebrates the unique bond between three very different characters. Also stars Greg Kinnear.

programme.title: The Toy (1982)
programme.desc: Remake of the Pierre Richard comedy LE JOUET with Pryor as a penniless writer hired by zillionaire Gleason as plaything for spoiled son Schwartz. Gleason tells his son he can have any present he wants and the son picks the most outrageous gift of all--Richard Pryor.

programme.title: Private Resort
programme.desc: Ben and Jack are a couple of guys hanging out at a posh Miami resort hoping to snag one of the wealthy and beautiful women who are staying there. Comic relief is provided by the Maestro, a jewel thief who dresses in drag. When he's not busy hopping in and out of bed, Jack manages to get Ben into plenty of trouble.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Darrin's client, the Solow Toy Company, sponsors HoHo the Clown on TV.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Tabitha's witchcraft, a ouija board and a ghost help Larry keep a client.
Mayhem and murder plague 227 when a mysterious man with a knife rents an apartment in Mary's building.

When Mary and Lester go to the reading of his uncle's will, they are both surprised to learn they have distant cousins whom they've never met, and even more confused when they discover they are a different color.
When Lester's old high school sweetheart comes to the neighborhood in search of a new home, Mary fears that she'll try to move in on more than just her turf.
Suffering from a very cold winter spell, the residents of "227" invade Mary and Lester's apartment, which is one of two apartments with heat.
When Mary and Lester's school teacher friend Mitchell meets Sandra, he sets out to win her pampered heart, no matter how many gifts or expensive dates it takes.
After a whirlwind courtship, Sandra accepts Mitchell's wedding proposal, making a commitment to trade in her glamorous life for what she not-so-long-ago considered a boring existence.
When Pearl finds out that Calvin is failing his history class, Mary, Rose and Lester each take turns as tutor-in-residence.

Though Brenda's but a week away from her sixteenth birthday, a milestone marking newfound dating freedom, Mary refuses to bend the rules and allow her to accept Calvin's invitation to the party of the year.
When Brenda's grandfather gives her his treasured collector's blues recording, she accidentally scratches the record and learns first-hand what the blues are all about.
When Mary and Lester assume the role of temporary foster parents, they're horrified to find Sandra's erotic lifestyle rubbing off on the impressionable co-ed.
When Mary's best high school chum, a successful television psychologist, pays her a visit, Mary feels somewhat inadequate when compared with her celebrity friend.
The tenants are thrilled when Rose hires a live-in handyman for some much needed repairs, only to find he's handier with the violin than the toolbox.
Mary has a terrible time trying to be polite to Fox, who is rude and obnoxious yet potentially important to Lester's financial future.
When Mary and Rose win the services of a butler in the church raffle, they look forward to the pampered life until they meet the pain-in-the-neck hired help.
Mary may be faced with eviction when 227's stingy landlord dies, and her nemesis Sandra is in line to inherit the building.

programme.sub-title: A Daughter Is A Precious Thing
programme.desc: When Mary can't solve daughter Brenda's boy problems, Brenda enlists the aid of an expert -- Mary's nemesis, Sandra, their sultry, sexy and "man-wise" neighbor.
Mayhem and murder plague 227 when a mysterious man with a knife rents an apartment in Mary's building.

When Mary and Lester go to the reading of his uncle's will, they are both surprised to learn they have distant cousins whom they've never met, and even more confused when they discover they are a different color.
When Lester's old high school sweetheart comes to the neighborhood in search of a new home, Mary fears that she'll try to move in on more than just her turf.
Suffering from a very cold winter spell, the residents of "227" invade Mary and Lester's apartment, which is one of two apartments with heat.
When Mary and Lester's school teacher friend Mitchell meets Sandra, he sets out to win her pampered heart, no matter how many gifts or expensive dates it takes.
After a whirlwind courtship, Sandra accepts Mitchell's wedding proposal, making a commitment to trade in her glamorous life for what she not-so-long-ago considered a boring existence.
When Pearl finds out that Calvin is failing his history class, Mary, Rose and Lester each take turns as tutor-in-residence.

Though Brenda's but a week away from her sixteenth birthday, a milestone marking newfound dating freedom, Mary refuses to bend the rules and allow her to accept Calvin's invitation to the party of the year.
When Brenda's grandfather gives her his treasured collector's blues recording, she accidentally scratches the record and learns first-hand what the blues are all about.
When Mary and Lester assume the role of temporary foster parents, they're horrified to find Sandra's erotic lifestyle rubbing off on the impressionable co-ed.
When Mary's best high school chum, a successful television psychologist, pays her a visit, Mary feels somewhat inadequate when compared with her celebrity friend.
The tenants are thrilled when Rose hires a live-in handyman for some much needed repairs, only to find he's handier with the violin than the toolbox.
Mary has a terrible time trying to be polite to Fox, who is rude and obnoxious yet potentially important to Lester's financial future.
When Mary and Rose win the services of a butler in the church raffle, they look forward to the pampered life until they meet the pain-in-the-neck hired help.
Mary may be faced with eviction when 227's stingy landlord dies, and her nemesis Sandra is in line to inherit the building.

programme.sub-title: A Daughter Is A Precious Thing
programme.desc: When Mary can't solve daughter Brenda's boy problems, Brenda enlists the aid of an expert -- Mary's nemesis, Sandra, their sultry, sexy and "man-wise" neighbor.
Mayhem and murder plague 227 when a mysterious man with a knife rents an apartment in Mary's building.

When Mary and Lester go to the reading of his uncle's will, they are both surprised to learn they have distant cousins whom they've never met, and even more confused when they discover they are a different color.
When Lester's old high school sweetheart comes to the neighborhood in search of a new home, Mary fears that she'll try to move in on more than just her turf.
Suffering from a very cold winter spell, the residents of "227" invade Mary and Lester's apartment, which is one of two apartments with heat.
When Mary and Lester's school teacher friend Mitchell meets Sandra, he sets out to win her pampered heart, no matter how many gifts or expensive dates it takes.
After a whirlwind courtship, Sandra accepts Mitchell's wedding proposal, making a commitment to trade in her glamorous life for what she not-so-long-ago considered a boring existence.
When Pearl finds out that Calvin is failing his history class, Mary, Rose and Lester each take turns as tutor-in-residence.

Though Brenda's but a week away from her sixteenth birthday, a milestone marking newfound dating freedom, Mary refuses to bend the rules and allow her to accept Calvin's invitation to the party of the year.
When Brenda's grandfather gives her his treasured collector's blues recording, she accidentally scratches the record and learns first-hand what the blues are all about.

programme.title: Resident Evil: Apocalypse
programme.desc: After escaping from the Racoon City Medical Facility Alice searches for answers to the T-Virus and how to contain it, all while trying to find a way to escape the ruined city with fellow survivors.

programme.title: Resident Evil: Extinction
programme.desc: Milla Jovovich is back to kill more zombies in the third chapter of the hit Resident Evil franchise! An action/horror film filled with huge special effects and edge-of-your-seat terror! Survivors of the Raccoon City catastrophe travel across the Nevada desert, hoping to make it to Alaska. Alice (Jovovich) joins the caravan and their fight against the evil Umbrella Corp.

programme.title: Jagged Edge (1985)
programme.desc: A defense attorney (Glenn Close) falls for her client, a rich, handsome publisher (Jeff Bridges) who may or may not be what the prosecution claims he is: a cold-blooded murderer.

programme.title: The Bone Collector
programme.desc: A paralyzed forensics expert and a young policewoman must work together to stop a brutal serial killer.

programme.title: Krull
programme.desc: A young prince battles aliens and sorcerers to rescue his princess from the Beast on the fantastic planet Krull.

programme.title: Stealth
programme.desc: Deeply ensconced in a top-secret military program, three pilots struggle to bring an artificial intelligence program under control ... before it initiates the next world war.

programme.title: The 6th Day
programme.desc: Human cloning technology has fallen into destructive, corrupt hands but one man refuses to be a pawn in the deadly conspiracy.

programme.title: Last Action Hero
programme.desc: Arnold Schwarzenegger is movie idol Jack Slater in Last Action Hero, which follows the adventures of 11-year-old Danny (Austin O'Brien), whose magic ticket blasts him out of his theater seat and into an action movie. There he teams up with Slater, living his wildest fantasies in a celluloid world where anything is possible.

programme.title: The Taking Of Pelham 1 2 3 (2009)
programme.desc: In The Taking of Pelham 1 2 3, Denzel Washington stars as New York City subway dispatcher Walter Garber, whose ordinary day is thrown into chaos by an audacious crime: the hijacking of a subway train.

programme.title: Rambo (2008)
programme.desc: Twenty years have passed and John Rambo has retreated to northern Thailand. When a group of human rights missionaries fall into the hands of the Burmese army he sets aside his reluctance for violence and conflict and the Vietnam lethal super soldier re-emerges.

programme.title: The Art Of War
programme.desc: Shaw is an operative for the United Nations' covert dirty-tricks squad, using espionage and quasi-ethical tactics to secure peace and cooperation. When a shipping container full of dead Vietnamese refugees turns up on the docks and China's ambassador is gunned down at a dinner celebrating a new trade agreement with China and the US, Shaw is framed for the murder and must evade the FBI and Triad gangsters to find out what is really going on.

programme.title: I Know What You Did Last Summer
programme.desc: Four friends made a pact to conceal a shocking secret. But now, someone has learned the truth.

programme.title: I Still Know What You Did Last Summer
programme.desc: Haunted by the brutal murders of her friends, Julie James is struggling to lead a normal life as a college freshman in Boston.

programme.title: Proud Mary
programme.desc: A hit woman's life is turned completely around when she meets a young boy who awakens in her a maternal instinct she never knew she had.

programme.title: The Dark Tower (2017)
programme.desc: Roland & the Man in Black share an ancient vendetta, they must fight to the death in an epic battle over the fate of the Universe.

programme.title: The Net
programme.desc: With a story ripped from today's headlines, THE NET is a compelling, high-tech drama about a computer systems analyst (Sandra Bullock) who becomes caught in a web of intrigue and conspiracy when she accidentally taps into a classified program.

programme.title: Proud Mary
programme.desc: A hit woman's life is turned completely around when she meets a young boy who awakens in her a maternal instinct she never knew she had.

programme.title: The Dark Tower (2017)
programme.desc: Roland & the Man in Black share an ancient vendetta, they must fight to the death in an epic battle over the fate of the Universe.

programme.title: The Net
programme.desc: With a story ripped from today's headlines, THE NET is a compelling, high-tech drama about a computer systems analyst (Sandra Bullock) who becomes caught in a web of intrigue and conspiracy when she accidentally taps into a classified program.

programme.title: The 5th Wave
programme.desc: When the human race is on the verge of extinction, one of the last survivors on earth, an extraordinary young woman, goes on a mission to track down her younger brother who was abducted by the extra-terrestial creatures colonizing earth.

programme.title: Hellboy
programme.desc: A demon, raised from infancy after being conjured by and rescued from the Nazis, grows up to become a defender against the forces of darkness.

programme.title: Ultraviolet
programme.desc: Set in the late 21st century, a subculture of humans called Hemophages has emerged who have been genetically modified, giving them enhanced speed, incredible stamina and acute intelligence. To the government's dismay, more and more of the population are being transformed, and they have set out to rid the world of this new subculture that they deem a menace to society. One rogue warrior is bent on protecting her race - and seeking revenge on those who changed her life forever. With fierce fighting skills and chameleon-like abilities, Violet sets out to destroy a government-designed time bomb that will eliminate all Hemophages.

programme.title: Anaconda
programme.desc: A monstrous snake terrorizes filmmakers on the Amazon River in this blockbuster hit starring Jon Voight, Jennifer Lopez, Ice Cube and Eric Stoltz.

programme.title: Whiplash
programme.desc: Winner of 3 Academy Awards, WHIPLASH tells the story of an ambitious student drummer (Miles Teller) and his ruthless teacher (J.K. Simmons) who will stop at nothing to achieve perfection.

programme.title: Vertical Limit
programme.desc: A brother mounts an extraordinary rescue effort to save his sister who is trapped on the world's most dangerous peak.

programme.title: The Patriot (2000)
programme.desc: In 1776 South Carolina, widower Benjamin Martin (Gibson) finds himself thrust into the midst of the American Revolutionary War as he helplessly watches his family being torn apart by the savage forces of the British Redcoats. When his oldest son's wife is ruthlessly killed, and his young son is shot through the back before his eyes, Martin is unable to suppress the soldier within that he tried to bury with his own military past. Unable to remain silent, he recruits a band of unlikely volunteers to take up arms against the British. Fighting to protect his famliy's freedom and his country's independence, Martin discovers the pain of betrayal, the redemption of revenge, and the passion of love.

programme.title: In the Line of Fire
programme.desc: Clint Eastwood delivers the goods as a veteran Secret Service agent whose shameful secret is known to the serial killer that eludes him.

programme.title: The Deep
programme.desc: Deep-sea divers vie with a Haitian drug dealer to recover a trunkload of sunken morphine. Based on Peter Benchley's best-selling novel.

programme.title: Lake Placid (1999)
programme.desc: A female paleontologist from New York City heads to Maine where local fish and game officials have discovered a gigantic and deadly 30-foot crocodile that appears to be living in one of the local .akes.

programme.title: Breaking Bad
programme.desc: Upset that his case has fallen apart as a result of the destruction of the mobile drug lab, Hank risks his career by attacking Jesse; worried that Jesse will talk, Walt offers him a chance to team up again in his new lab.

programme.title: Breaking Bad
programme.desc: As Hank clings to life following the drug cartel's attempt to kill him, Walt looks to insulate himself from more trouble by taking on Jesse as a partner when he realizes that the hit men may have been after him, too.

programme.title: Breaking Bad
programme.desc: As he and Walt resume production, Jesse looks for a way to increase his take, while the prospects for Hank's recovery place Marie at odds with their insurance company.

programme.title: Breaking Bad
programme.desc: A long night in the lab pits Walt and Jesse against a pesky fly.

programme.title: Breaking Bad
programme.desc: As Hank is unhappy with the pace of his recovery, and Skyler questions Saul's money-laundering scheme, Jesse falls for a fellow rehab patient who he learns is tied to the murder of his late friend, Combo.

programme.title: Breaking Bad
programme.desc: As Walt calls Skyler's bluff and moves back home without her consent, Jesse ponders re-entering the drug trade as a Mexican cartel anxiously awaits its opportunity to get revenge for the death of one of its own.

programme.title: Battle of the Sexes
programme.desc: The 1973 tennis match between Billie Jean King and Bobby Riggs became the most watched televised sports event of all time. Trapped in the media glare, King and Riggs were on opposites sides of a binary argument, but off-court each was fighting more personal and complex battles. With her husband urging her to fight for equal pay, the private King was also struggling to come to terms with her own sexuality, while Riggs gambled his legacy and reputation in a bid to relive the glories of his past.

programme.title: Twilight
programme.desc: High-school student Bella Swan, always a bit of a misfit, doesn't expect life to change much when she moves from sunny Arizona to rainy Washington state. Then she meets Edward Cullen, a handsome but mysterious teen whose eyes seem to peer directly into her soul. Edward is a vampire whose family does not drink blood, and Bella, far from being frightened, enters into a dangerous romance with her immortal soulmate.

programme.title: The Twilight Saga: New Moon
programme.desc: After the abrupt departure of Edward, her vampire love, Bella finds comfort in her deepening friendship with Jacob Black. However, Bella's loyalties are put to the test as she becomes drawn into the world of werewolves, ancient enemies of vampires.

programme.title: The Twilight Saga: Eclipse
programme.desc: Danger once again surrounds Bella, as a string of mysterious killings terrorizes Seattle and a malicious vampire continues her infernal quest for revenge. Amid the tumult, Bella must choose between her love for Edward and her friendship with Jacob, knowing that her decision may ignite the long-simmering feud between vampire and werewolf.

programme.title: The Twilight Saga: Breaking Dawn Part 1
programme.desc: At last, Bella and Edward are getting married. When Jacob finds out that Bella wants to spend her honeymoon as a human, he is horrified, for Edward's passion could accidentally kill her. Bella does indeed survive her honeymoon, but a new complication arises when she discovers that she's pregnant, and the child is growing at an alarming rate. The pregnancy sets the wolves against Bella and Edward, but Jacob vows to protect his friend.

programme.title: The Twilight Saga: Breaking Dawn Part 2
programme.desc: Bella awakes, as a vampire, from her life-threatening labor, and her newborn daughter, Renesmee, proves to be very special indeed. While Bella adjusts to her new state of being, Renesmee experiences accelerated growth. When the Volturi learn of the baby's existence, they declare her to be an abomination and sentence the Cullens to death. Bella, Edward and the rest of the clan seek help from allies around the world to protect their family.

programme.title: Earth, Wind & Fire (To Be Celestial vs. That's the Weight of the World)
programme.desc: Directed by Ahmir Questlove Thompson, exploring the musical origins and lasting cultural impact of Earth, Wind and Fire.

programme.title: Behind the Candelabra
programme.desc: World-famous pianist Liberace (Michael Douglas) takes much-younger Scott Thorson (Matt Damon) as a lover, but the relationship deteriorates when Liberace takes other bedmates and Thorson becomes addicted to drugs.

programme.title: Gran Turismo
programme.desc: The true story of a team of unlikely underdogs -- a working-class gamer, a former race car driver, and an idealistic motorsport executive -- who risk it all to take on the most elite sport in the world.

programme.title: Life, Larry and the Pursuit of Unhappiness
programme.desc: President and Mrs. Obama want to honor America's 250th anniversary and celebrate the history of the nation on the occasion, but then Larry David calls.

programme.title: The Devil Wears Prada
programme.desc: Andy is a recent college graduate with big dreams. Upon landing a job at prestigious Runway magazine, she finds herself the assistant to diabolical editor Miranda Priestly. Andy questions her ability to survive her grim tour as Miranda's whipping girl without getting scorched.

programme.title: The Lobster
programme.desc: In a dystopian society, single people must find a mate within 45 days or be transformed into an animal of their choice.

programme.title: Shadows
programme.desc: A high school student exploring her independence on homecoming night is disrupted by her older brother and the shadows of their past.

programme.title: Mortal Kombat
programme.desc: Hunted by the fearsome warrior Sub-Zero, MMA fighter Cole Young finds sanctuary at the temple of Lord Raiden. Training with experienced fighters Liu Kang, Kung Lao and the rogue mercenary Kano, Cole prepares to stand with Earth's greatest champions to take on the enemies from Outworld in a high-stakes battle for the universe.

programme.title: Mel Brooks: The 99 Year Old Man!
programme.desc: Chronicling the early experiences that shaped Brooks' comedic voice, from his childhood in Brooklyn, to his combat service in WWII, and the highs and lows of working in the Borscht Belt and the dawning era of television.

programme.title: Mel Brooks: The 99 Year Old Man!
programme.desc: Charting Brooks' rise to superstardom and the enduring impact of his work on audiences and future generations of comedic writers and performers.

programme.title: The Greatest Showman
programme.desc: Growing up in the early 1800s, P.T. Barnum displays a natural talent for publicity and promotion, selling lottery tickets by age 12. After trying his hands at various jobs, P.T. turns to show business to indulge his limitless imagination, rising from nothing to create the Barnum & Bailey circus. Featuring catchy musical numbers, exotic performers and daring acrobatic feats, Barnum's mesmerizing spectacle soon takes the world by storm to become the greatest show on Earth.

programme.title: "Wuthering Heights"
programme.desc: Tragedy strikes when Heathcliff falls in love with Catherine Earnshaw, a woman from a wealthy family in 18th-century England.

programme.title: Pillion
programme.desc: A timid man is swept off his feet when an enigmatic, impossibly handsome biker takes him on as his submissive.

programme.title: Weapons
programme.desc: When all but one child from the same classroom mysteriously vanish on the same night at exactly the same time, a community is left questioning who or what is behind their disappearance.

programme.title: Sinners
programme.desc: Trying to leave their troubled lives behind, twin brothers return to their Mississippi hometown to start again, only to discover that an even greater evil is waiting to welcome them back.

programme.title: Marty Supreme

programme.title: A Good Day to Die Hard
programme.desc: New York City cop John McClane (Bruce Willis) arrives in Moscow to track down his estranged son, Jack (Jai Courtney). McClane thinks his son is a criminal, so it comes as a shock when he learns that Jack is actually working undercover to protect Komarov (Sebastian Koch), a Russian government whistleblower. With their own lives on the line, McClane and Jack must overcome their differences in order to get Komarov to safety and thwart a potentially disastrous crime in the Chernobyl region.

programme.desc: Disowned by his obscenely wealthy family, Becket Redfellow will stop at nothing to reclaim his inheritance, no matter how many relatives stand in his way.

programme.desc: With the price on his head ever-increasing, legendary hit man John Wick takes his fight against the High Table global as he seeks out the most powerful players in the underworld, from New York to Paris to Japan to Berlin.

programme.title: The Mummy
programme.desc: Nick Morton is a soldier of fortune who plunders ancient sites for timeless artifacts and sells them to the highest bidder. When Nick and his partner come under attack in the Middle East, the ensuing battle accidentally unearths Ahmanet, a betrayed Egyptian princess who was entombed under the desert for thousands of years. With her powers constantly evolving, Morton must now stop the resurrected monster as she embarks on a furious rampage through the streets of London.

programme.title: Sorry, Baby
programme.desc: Something terrible happened to Agnes. But life goes on for everyone else. When a friend visits on the brink of an important milestone, Agnes realizes how stuck she's been, in this bittersweet story of finding your way after your world comes crashing down.

programme.title: Norm of the North
programme.desc: Norm (Rob Schneider) the polar bear doesn't know how to hunt, but he does possess the unique ability to talk to humans. When the wealthy Mr. Greene (Ken Jeong) unveils his idea to build luxury condos in the Arctic, Norm realizes that his beloved home is in jeopardy. Accompanied by three mischievous lemmings, Norm stows away on a ship to New York. Once there, he meets a surprising ally (Maya Kay) who helps him hatch a scheme to sabotage the shady developer's plans.

programme.title: Nine Lives
programme.desc: Tom Brand is a billionaire whose workaholic lifestyle takes him away from his loving wife Lara and adorable daughter Rebecca. Needing a present for Rebecca's 11th birthday, Brand buys a seemingly harmless cat from a mysterious pet store. Suddenly, a bizarre turn of events traps poor Tom inside the animal's body. The owner of the business tells him that he has one week to reconnect with his family, or live out the rest of his days as a cute and furry feline named Mr. Fuzzypants.

programme.title: Shaun the Sheep Movie
programme.desc: All is well at Mossy Bottom Farm, except for the fact that the animals will do anything to get out of work. So, Shaun the sheep and his scheming friends devise a plan to put their master to sleep. However, the ruse backfires when the poor farmer finds himself transported to the big city, having lost his memory. Now, it's up to Sean, Timmy the lamb, Shirley the ewe and the rest of the gang to travel to the metropolis and get him back, while not landing in even more trouble themselves.

programme.title: The LEGO NINJAGO Movie
programme.desc: The battle for NINJAGO City calls to action young Master Builder Lloyd, aka the Green Ninja, along with his friends, also secret ninja warriors. Led by Master Wu, as wise-cracking as he is wise, they must defeat the evil warlord Garmadon, who also happens to be Lloyd's dad. Pitting father against son, the epic showdown tests these fierce but undisciplined modern-day ninjas as they learn to check their egos and pull together to unleash the inner power of Spinjitzu.

programme.title: Charlie Hustle & the Matter of Pete Rose
programme.desc: At the age of 81, more than three decades after receiving a lifetime ban for gambling, former Cincinnati Reds star Pete Rose reignites his quest for reinstatement into Major League Baseball while recounting his unlikely rise to the top of the sport.

programme.title: Charlie Hustle & the Matter of Pete Rose
programme.desc: Nicknamed "Charlie Hustle" for dirty work ethic, Pete Rose becomes the face of baseball; Rose helps transform the Cincinnati Reds into the "Big Red Machine," winning back-to-back World Series titles in the '70s.

programme.title: Charlie Hustle & the Matter of Pete Rose
programme.desc: Pete Rose becomes the highest paid player in baseball; in 1985 he breaks Ty Cobb's record to become MLB's all-time career hits leader; but a gambling scandal leads to a prison sentence and lifetime banishment from the game he loves.

programme.title: Charlie Hustle & the Matter of Pete Rose
programme.desc: After years of denial, in 2004, Pete Rose publicly admits that he bet on the game of baseball; Rose confronts the truth about his public image and makes one last bid for MLB reinstatement and enshrinement in the National Baseball Hall of Fame.

programme.title: Gran Turismo
programme.desc: The true story of a team of unlikely underdogs -- a working-class gamer, a former race car driver, and an idealistic motorsport executive -- who risk it all to take on the most elite sport in the world.

programme.title: Bride of Frankenstein
programme.desc: After recovering from injuries sustained in the mob attack upon himself and his creation, Dr. Frankenstein (Colin Clive) falls under the control of his former mentor, Dr. Pretorius (Ernest Thesiger), who insists the now-chastened doctor resume his experiments in creating new life. Meanwhile, the Monster (Boris Karloff) remains on the run from those who wish to destroy him without understanding that his intentions are generally good despite his lack of socialization and self-control.

programme.title: Mary Shelley's Frankenstein
programme.desc: As Viktor Frankenstein (Kenneth Branagh) is dying he shares a tale of gruesome terror with a sea captain. Viktor, using previous experiments by a brilliant scientist, was able to bring a creature (Robert De Niro) assembled from body parts back to life. Once he realized how destructive his experiments had become, he abandoned the creature and tried to live a normal life with his fiance (Helena Bonham Carter). The lonely creature seeks out Viktor and demands one of two things: a bride or revenge.

programme.title: The Bride!
programme.desc: A scientist revives a murdered woman as a companion for a legendary creature. The aftermath defies all expectations.

programme.title: I Love You Forever
programme.desc: Following a young woman into and out of an emotionally abusive relationship.

programme.title: Meg 2: The Trench
programme.desc: Jonas Taylor leads a research team on an exploratory dive into the deepest depths of the ocean. Their voyage spirals into chaos when a malevolent mining operation threatens their mission and forces them into a high-stakes battle for survival. Pitted against colossal, prehistoric sharks and relentless environmental plunderers, they must outrun, outsmart and outswim their merciless predators.

programme.title: Puss in Boots
programme.desc: Long before meeting Shrek, Puss in Boots, just named a hero for saving a woman from a charging bull, is run out of town on suspicion of bank robbery, even though the real villain is Puss' friend, Humpty Dumpty. Though there is still animosity between them, Puss and Humpty reunite to steal a goose that lays golden eggs. Joining them for the adventure of nine lifetimes is notorious cat burglar, Kitty Softpaws.

programme.title: Paddington 2
programme.desc: Settled in with the Brown family, Paddington the bear is a popular member of the community who spreads joy and marmalade wherever he goes. One fine day, he spots a pop-up book in an antique shop -- the perfect present for his beloved aunt's 100th birthday. When a thief steals the prized book, Paddington embarks on an epic quest to unmask the culprit before Aunt Lucy's big celebration.

programme.title: Dr. Seuss' The Cat in the Hat
programme.desc: In this live-action film based on the favorite children's tale, the trouble-making Cat in the Hat (Mike Myers) arrives at the home of bored young Sally Walden (Dakota Fanning) and her brother, Conrad (Spencer Breslin), while their mother (Kelly Preston) is out. The family's pet fish (Sean Hayes) objects to the Cat's presence, but that doesn't stop the hat-wearing giant feline from trying to have fun, no matter how much destruction is left in his wake.

programme.title: Crazy, Stupid, Love.
programme.desc: Cal Weaver (Steve Carell) is living the American dream. He has a good job, a beautiful house, great children and a beautiful wife, named Emily (Julianne Moore). Cal's seemingly perfect life unravels, however, when he learns that Emily has been unfaithful and wants a divorce. Over 40 and suddenly single, Cal is adrift in the fickle world of dating. Enter, Jacob Palmer (Ryan Gosling), a self-styled player who takes Cal under his wing and teaches him how to be a hit with the ladies.

programme.title: The Devil Wears Prada
programme.desc: Andy is a recent college graduate with big dreams. Upon landing a job at prestigious Runway magazine, she finds herself the assistant to diabolical editor Miranda Priestly. Andy questions her ability to survive her grim tour as Miranda's whipping girl without getting scorched.

programme.title: Get Him to the Greek
programme.desc: An ambitious executive at a record company, Aaron Green (Jonah Hill) gets what looks like an easy assignment: He must escort British rock legend Aldous Snow (Russell Brand) to L.A.'s Greek Theatre for the first stop on a lucrative comeback-concert tour. Snow, however, has different plans. Learning his true love is in California, the rocker vows to win her back before starting the tour, forcing Aaron to pull out all the stops to get Snow on stage in time.

programme.title: Taylor Mac's 24-Decade History of Popular Music
programme.desc: Performance artist Taylor Mac and 24 musicians reframe American history during a 24-hour concert that features popular songs from 1776 to 2016.

programme.title: Tina
programme.desc: Never-before-seen footage, audio tapes, personal photos and intimate interviews provide insight into the remarkable life and career of legendary singer Tina Turner.

programme.title: The Witch
programme.desc: In 1630 New England, panic and despair envelops a farmer, his wife and their children when youngest son Samuel suddenly vanishes. The family blames Thomasin, the oldest daughter who was watching the boy at the time of his disappearance. With suspicion and paranoia mounting, twin siblings Mercy and Jonas suspect Thomasin of witchcraft, testing the clan's faith, loyalty and love to one another.

programme.title: The Blair Witch Project
programme.desc: Found video footage tells the tale of three film students (Heather Donahue, Joshua Leonard, Michael C. Williams) who've traveled to a small town to collect documentary footage about the Blair Witch, a legendary local murderer. Over the course of several days, the students interview townspeople and gather clues to support the tale's veracity. But the project takes a frightening turn when the students lose their way in the woods and begin hearing horrific noises.

programme.title: Book of Shadows: Blair Witch 2
programme.desc: As it follows the twisted path traveled by five people fixated on "The Blair Witch Project," "Book of Shadows: Blair Witch 2" journeys into a dark and dangerous place where the line between truth and fiction blurs and perhaps vanishes altogether. Individual perception grows increasingly untrustworthy as the film's protagonists find themselves caught in a vortex of unspeakable evil, the origins of which -- human or supernatural -- remain chillingly uncertain.

programme.title: Blair Witch
programme.desc: A young man and his friends venture into the Black Hills Forest in Maryland to uncover the mystery surrounding his missing sister. Many believe her disappearance 17 years earlier is connected to the legend of the Blair Witch. At first the group is hopeful, especially when two locals act as guides through the dark and winding woods. As the night wears on, a visit from a menacing presence soon makes them realize that the legend is all too real, and more sinister than they could have ever imagined.

programme.title: Flight Risk
programme.desc: A U.S. marshal boards a small plane to transfer a government witness to New York. As they cross the Alaskan wilderness, tensions start to rise as not everyone on the flight is who they appear to be.

programme.title: Enemy
programme.desc: A mild-mannered college professor (Jake Gyllenhaal) discovers a look-alike actor and delves into the other man's private affairs.

programme.title: Parthenope
programme.desc: The beautiful Parthenope searches for love in the heady, hot summers and endless nights of her youth in Naples, Italy, as she falls for the city's many unforgettable characters and finds herself in the adventures that make up a lifetime.

programme.title: The Lobster
programme.desc: In a dystopian society, single people must find a mate within 45 days or be transformed into an animal of their choice.

programme.title: Ferdinand
programme.desc: Ferdinand is a young bull who escapes from a training camp in rural Spain after his father never returns from a showdown with a matador. Adopted by a girl who lives on a farm, Ferdinand's peaceful existence comes crashing down when the authorities return him to his former captors. With help from a wisecracking goat and three hedgehogs, the giant but gentle bovine must find a way to break free before he squares off against El Primero, the famous bullfighter who never loses.

programme.title: Superman Returns
programme.desc: While Lex Luthor plots to destroy him once and for all, the Man of Steel returns after a long absence to a much-changed world. Lois Lane has moved on with her life, and society has learned to survive without him. Superman must find a way to reconnect with her and find his place in a world that may no longer need him.

programme.title: The Suicide Squad
programme.desc: The government sends the most dangerous supervillains in the world -- Bloodsport, Peacemaker, King Shark, Harley Quinn and others -- to the remote, enemy-infused island of Corto Maltese. Armed with high-tech weapons, they trek through the dangerous jungle on a search-and-destroy mission, with only Col. Rick Flag on the ground to make them behave.

programme.title: Portraits of a Lady
programme.desc: In October 2006, 25 artists come together to paint varied images of Justice Sandra Day O'Connor of the U.S. Supreme Court.

programme.title: Magic Mike's Last Dance
programme.desc: Mike Lane takes to the stage once again when a business deal that went bust leaves him broke and bartending in Florida. Hoping for one last hurrah, Mike heads to London with a wealthy socialite who lures him with an offer he can't refuse -- and an agenda all her own. With everything on the line, he soon finds himself trying to whip a hot new roster of talented dancers into shape.

programme.title: The Unbreakable Tatiana Suarez
programme.desc: A chronicle of the MMA fighter Tatiana Suarez as she returns to the sport after an injury forced a four-year hiatus; Suarez reflects on her journey from wrestling prodigy to professional athlete in the UFC and the legacy she leaves young women.

programme.title: Miss You, Love You
programme.desc: A blunt, grieving widow is forced to plan her husband's funeral with a total stranger: her estranged son's assistant.

programme.title: A Complete Unknown
programme.desc: In the early 1960s, 19-year-old Bob Dylan arrives in New York with his guitar and revolutionary talent, destined to change the course of American music. Forming his most intimate relationships during his rise to fame, he grows restless with the folk movement, making a controversial choice that reverberates worldwide.

programme.desc: Feature-length drama. The owner of Easterly Grange Hotel has died as an annual festival begins in the hotel's gardens - Barnaby attends the funeral and learns that the manager of the hotel is missing. The reading of the will reveals that the hotel has been divided among the missing manager, his glamorous wife, the hotel chef and the hotel accountant - after a dog appears with the severed hand of the missing manager, Barnaby begins some serious enquiries. Threatening notes are soon delivered to each of those named in the will - and accidents befall them one by one. One is poisoned by mushrooms, another accidentally shot, another crushed by a falling drinks cabinet and two nearly killed when their van's are sabotaged - Barnaby discovers that there had been a new will entrusted to the hotel manager but that it disappeared when he disappeared. Could that explain why the will's beneficiaries have all suffered fatal accidents... and who the destroying angel that has arranged the deaths is?

Sensing danger surrounding her sister Carrie-Louise, Ruth Van Rydock enlists the help of her old friend Miss Marple - when Carrie-Louise's beloved stepbrother is then murdered during a dress rehearsal of an amateur stage show, Jane has to draw from her deep understanding of human character in order to unpick the conjuring trick played out by the murderer and reveal their identity.

programme.title: Endeavour
programme.desc: Crime drama. It's the winter of 1971 - the team are called to investigate the violent and peculiar murder of an Oxford college don, but when Thursday makes an unexpected discovery, Endeavour's suitability to work on the case is compromised and he is sidelined. Meanwhile, things at home become quite tense for Thursday and Win when they receive disturbing news from abroad, and although officially off the clock, Endeavour follows a lead that unravels an intricate plot beyond his wildest imagination. Endeavour finds himself at an abandoned hotel where the body of another fellow bus passenger is found murdered in the same peculiar way as the college don - trapped with a group he can't be sure to trust, Endeavour slowly comes to learn the disturbing truth about those he finds himself amongst. With Endeavour in danger, the buck rests with Thursday to put together the final pieces of the puzzle.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: When Susan Bartlett's body is discovered in a wood, villagers assume she killed herself because she could not have children. However, when it comes to light that her suicide note - in the form of an email - was sent too late, Barnaby soon finds himself in the midst of witchcraft, ancient potions, infidelity and land feuds.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Feature-length drama. When the bellringers of Midsomer Wellow each win 5000 pounds on a horse called Ring-a-Ding, they see it as a good omen for success in the forthcoming Striking Competition until one of their number is found shot dead in the belfry - Greg Tutt was a serial womaniser recently dumped by his wife Sue, but DCI Tom Barnaby suspects that there is more to the murder than affairs of the heart. Retired RAF officer Reggie Barton hates the bellringers and tells his son Hugh that he is leaving his estate to the church on condition that they are stopped - bellringer Emma Tysoe is then brutally murdered on her wedding day with words from an ancient village rhyme left at the scene. Frances Le Bon and the rest of the team receive letters with other lines from the poem and fear they are next - as Barnaby's wife Joyce pours through Midsomer Wellow's history books with the help of parish archivist Maisie Gooch, the detectives must solve a riddle before the killer strikes again...

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Feature-length drama. Devington College - a public school of minimal academic attainment but endowed with contacts - dominates the economy and social life of Midsomer Parva - when the activities of its Mafia-like elite Pudding Club lead to murder and mayhem in both college and village.

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: Detective drama series based on the characters created by Ann Cleeves. DCI Vera Stanhope investigates the brutal murder of young physiotherapist Lizzie Faulkner, who was gunned down at a luxury country retreat - in a story of betrayal, guilt and the need for atonement, Vera must move quickly to avoid another tragedy. Meanwhile, Joe finally makes amends with the demons from his own past.

programme.title: The Lady
programme.desc: Drama based on real events. Jane believes that marriage with boyfriend Tommy is just around the corner, but cracks soon appear in the relationship and a toxic pattern starts to emerge. Now living together, Jane and Tommy try to integrate into each other's social circles - however, some of their friends are disapproving of the relationship. Confronted with the sudden appearance of a ghost from her past at a party, Jane starts to unravel and her relationship with Tommy hangs in the balance - on a make-or-break holiday in the south of France with Tommy's family, tensions reach a head with disastrous consequences.

programme.title: The Lady
programme.desc: The conclusion of the drama based on real events. Jane's fairytale falls apart when she finds herself at the centre of a police investigation - released on bail, Jane reconnects with an old friend from palace life whose unexpected support gives her hope. Back in London, Jane faces a trial at the Old Bailey - as the prosecution and defence battle it out, Jane starts to lose her grip on reality and makes a shocking allegation when she takes to the stand as the prosecution continue to put pressure on her about the inconsistencies in her story.

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: Hastings is staying with the Inglethorpes at Styles St Mary, but when their hostess is found murdered, he sends for his old friend Hercule Poirot.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Crime drama series. Wealthy landowner Gregory Lancaster breathes his last surrounded by his wife Hermione, his daughter Rose, and Rose's partner Craig Coffley - Dr Isaac Vernon confirms the death as Gregory's son, Antarctic expedition leader Felix, arrives just too late to see his father. Undertakers Caleb Southwood and Ellie Loxley go to the body only to discover that it has gone missing - when the Barnabys and Betty see Nelson arrive with the news, Barnaby and Nelson find new pathologist Kam Karimore in place at Malton Hall and Nelson tells Barnaby that they have got off on the wrong foot. Concluding that the body was removed via the window, Barnaby and Nelson interview the family and learn that Felix plans to affect a quick sale while a visit from the Reverend Melissa Ackers shows bad blood between the family and the vicar - when the body of the Lancasters' ex-nanny is stolen from the graveyard, Barnaby and Nelson are drawn into a macabre world as they seek to identify the culprit.

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Sarah acts violently at her playgroup and Jo is stunned after being told she cannot return to nursery until the next term. Carl tells Matthew to give Anna time to grieve.

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Katie tells Andy to face up to some home truths after his fight with Daz and helps him organise a nativity play. Edna aids Lily in settling her debt with the factory workers.

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Carla must make a decision about Tony, and as the week's episodes conclude, it remains to be seen whether Liam meets his end before Maria can tell him he is going to be a dad.

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Liam's death sends shockwaves around the Street. Maria is devastated, and a grief-stricken Carla tries to hide the depth of her feelings from Tony - unaware he knows everything.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Nostalgic police drama series set in a Yorkshire village in the 1960s. David befriends a little girl whose parents are going through a messy divorce. Craddock shares a surprising secret with Blaketon.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Nostalgic police drama series set in a Yorkshire village in the 1960s. While a mysterious series of burglaries helps Mike to reunite an estranged family, Ventress tries to stop Greengrass's latest scam by arresting his dog.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: The village of Blacktrees-on-Marsh has long been haunted by a Cold War prophecy, prompting a small group of locals to form Midsomer’s first doomsday prepper group. Founded two decades ago by the obsessive Warren Kaine, the group provides comfort to its paranoid members - until the morning Warren receives a hoax call that nuclear missiles have launched. Racing to his bombproof underground bunker, he radios the others to join him. But as dawn breaks over village green serenity rather than a scorched earth, Warren's resentful wife Clodagh arrives at the shelter to find him dead. Pathologist Fleur Perkins discovers Warren was suffocated after someone with technical skills tampered with the air filter. As DCI John Barnaby and DS Jamie Winter investigate, they must determine if someone was desperate to get their hands on the bunker, or if a killer is targeting the preppers. The pressure is on to catch the culprit before they strike again.

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: Ronnie and Matt are stumped when they investigate the murders of David and Elaine Lerner, who were stabbed to death as they slept. The Lerners seemed to have been universally loved, and there is not a single lead which points to grievances against them - were they really the intended victims? Soon the police realise that a much more likely target for attack is the previous owner of the house - Camilla Mallon, a banker embroiled in a hedge fund scandal. Could the murders be a case of mistaken identity? As crown prosecutors Jake Thorne and Alesha Phillips try to navigate a case in which the suspect has no apparent motive or intent to commit the crime, can they make a murder charge stick? Meanwhile, Jake's old mentor Margaret Rumsfield argues that the accused should only face manslaughter charges.

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: The team investigate when mother and carer Lia Brown is killed by a stray bullet, and find themselves struggling to understand the involvement of 12 year old Kaden Blake in her death. Kaden is caught up in the local gang culture, and keeping silent is his only protection. DS Matt Devlin is drawn to this damaged boy, saddened to see a life so doomed by circumstance and furious that local dealer and gang leader Mark Ellis remains untouchable by the law. Matt forces the hands of the crown prosecutors to move Ellis into the frame for Lia's death, but the culture of intimidation and silence which rules gang life seems set to undo all of the team's good work. It is up to Kaden himself to find the courage to speak out - but when he does so, he sets in motion a shattering chain of events.

programme.desc: Extreme fishing series. Jeremy Wade travels to Colombia, one of the most dangerous countries in South America, to search for a river monster that is thought to have dragged a honeymoon bride to her death - his investigation begins with the usual suspects, but when none of those fish prove capable of inflicting the wounds found on the bride, a key witness turns the search on its head. Jeremy then conducts an experiment to prove that his new yet unlikely suspect is capable of dragging an adult under the water before pushing his fishing gear past breaking point to discover the river monster known as the Colombian Slasher...

programme.desc: Much-lauded comedy which fuses the style and copious bloodshed of classic zombie films with observational suburban humour. Things get worse when the living dead make their appearance and threaten to spread their zombie curse across the nation... will Shaun be able to rise from his sofa to save the lives of the two women that he loves?

programme.title: Project Hail Mary
